title: Emotion Specificity
locus: No Limits L3 — Hand Sanitizer Station
status: Build ★★★★★ at E13. Day-0 retest skipped (image-gen handoff took the slot). Day-1 skipped at E14 + E15 (B2 tabled both sessions). E16 = first verification with no Day-0 baseline, 4 days dormant.
whyItWorks: Generic emotions fade because they're not anchored to anything specific — happy, scared, excited could be any image, any context. Specific named emotions stick because they require a precise feeling-word that has its own visual signature on a face and body. The encoded image: elbowing the wall-mounted hand sanitizer dispenser at No Limits gym, sanitizer bottles floating weightless in midair while 100 pounds of clear gel piles onto my body and the floor — gravity off and gravity on in the same frame. The named emotion is LIMITLESS — distinct from powerful (directional) or free (choice-based) or energized (activation state). Limitless means no upper bound on capability, every constraint dissolved. The recursive trick: the gym is called No Limits. The locus's brand IS the emotion's hook. Walking past the dispenser fires the brand which fires the emotion which fires the lesson. Miles-generated one-liner 'Feel uniquely, remember automatically' is tighter than the canonical — 4-word parallel formula, chant-ready.

title: Physics-Breaking Images
oneLiner: See the Matrix — AKA Make the Loci Loco. Build images that defy gravity, scale, or time.
locus: No Limits L2 — Gym Lobby Chalkboard
status: Day-1 ★★★★☆ retest at E13 (improved from Day-0 ★★★☆☆). Day-2+ never retested. 'Make the Loci LOCO' wordplay drift owed for 4 sessions running (E14, E15, E16) — concrete image hook still pending.
whyItWorks: Default-scale static images fade. Physics-breaking images survive because the brain pays extra attention to anomalies — gravity violations, dimensional impossibilities, scale mismatches. The encoded image was recursive: a 2D chalkboard producing 3D binary code that fell with a ton's weight despite being microscopic, then climbed up my legs and packed into my muscles. The named emotion was DOWNLOADED with code, Neo-style. Day-0 retest at E12 dropped to ★★★☆☆ on dimension-break specificity drift. Day-1 retest at E13 improved to ★★★★☆ — the OPPOSITE of L1's Day-0 → Day-1 drift trajectory. Some images consolidate overnight; some drift. Two datapoints isn't enough but the pattern is worth tracking. The 'Make the Loci LOCO' wordplay (loci → loco, Spanish 'crazy', layered with the Matrix reference) lost completely on Day-1 retest — verbal-only wordplay drill won't lock without a concrete image hook (E12 architectural-pivot rule). Owed: anchor 'LOCO' to a visible thing — the chalkboard itself going crazy, drawings dancing, erasing themselves like a Matrix glitch.

title: EPIC Framework
oneLiner: Make This Shit EPIC — Energize · Physics-breaking · Impossible scale · Charged emotion.
status: Day-1 partial at E12 — C-pillar drift unresolved (sacrifice for glory and greatness + biceps/calves swelling). Day-2+ never retested. 5 sessions of deferral (E11→E15). Flag-escalation Session 3 trigger CROSSED at E15 — RESET+REBUILD from scratch at E16 (throw away current image, not just rebuild).
whyItWorks: Default-scale, static, emotionally flat images don't survive 30-day cold tests. EPIC bakes in all four pillars at encoding time so the image is championship-grade by construction. My own upgrade of the standard SEE principle. Built ★★★★★ at E11 with image enrichment on Day-0 cold fire (added 35ft, red gym, shape-only door, stalking prey). Day-1 cold test at E12 caught drift on the I and C pillars despite championship-grade emotional anchor — image enrichment may be a Day-0-only effect, not Day-1 durability. Day-2 retest at E13/E14/E15 deferred (5th deferral). C-pillar 'sacrifice for glory and greatness + biceps/calves swelling' anchors haven't recovered after 1 drill rep. Flag-escalation Session 3 trigger crossed — image is architecturally broken; full reset and rebuild from scratch at E16 with new EPIC pass from zero.
